description: Backend data contract for Sessions page – manage attendance sessions per class. Supports opening, pausing, resuming, closing sessions, with stats and filtering.

getStats.description: Get KPI statistics for the top cards (open sessions, paused, closed today, total scans across all sessions).

data.totalScans: number (sum of scan counts across all sessions)

getSessions.description: Fetch paginated list of sessions with filters and search.

queryParams.class: string (optional, full class name e.g., 'Cls 10' or 'All')
queryParams.status: enum: OPEN, PAUSED, CLOSED, ALL (optional, default ALL)
queryParams.search: string (optional, searches class, subject, teacher, section)
queryParams.sortBy: string (optional, default opened_at desc, e.g., opened_at, scans)

sessions.subject: string
sessions.scans: number (current scan count for this session)

requestBody.subject: string (required)
requestBody.teacher: string (optional, if not provided backend may assign default or use current user)

data.closed_at: datetime or null (only updated if status = CLOSED)

getFilterOptions.description: Get available classes for filter dropdown (based on actual sessions data).

exportSessions.description: Export filtered sessions as CSV (same query params as getSessions, no pagination).
exportSessions.response: CSV file download with columns: id, class, section, subject, teacher, status, opened_at, closed_at, duration_minutes, scans, total_students, attendance_rate

fieldNotes.total_students: Number of students enrolled in the class-section at the time of session opening.
fieldNotes.duration_minutes: Not stored but can be computed as (closed_at - opened_at) in minutes for export.
fieldNotes.closed_today: Stat counts sessions where closed_at date = current date.
fieldNotes.scans: Incremented each time a student successfully scans during the session.
fieldNotes.status transitions: OPEN → PAUSED (pause), PAUSED → OPEN (resume), OPEN/PAUSED → CLOSED (close). Once CLOSED, cannot reopen (must create new session).
